content:
# elizaos/eliza Daily Update (Jun 3, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development on June 3, 2026, focused on stabilizing the application environment, enhancing UI interactivity, and resolving critical authentication blockers for the cloud staging environment. Significant progress was made in CI/CD alignment, local inference error handling, and expanding the plugin registry.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

**UI Enhancements and Documentation**
*   Added a prompt-suggestion strip to the `ContinuousChatOverlay` to improve user onboarding ([#8201](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8201)).
*   Expanded Storybook coverage by adding documentation for nine UI primitives, including `Table`, `Tabs`, and `Tooltip` components ([#8200](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8200)).

**Cloud Authentication and API Fixes**
*   Resolved magic-link sign-in failures on staging by updating CSP connect-src, CORS allowlists, and handling missing app-auth contexts ([#8197](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8197), [#8196](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8196), [#8194](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8194)).

**System Stability and CI/CD**
*   Aligned zero-key app smoke tests with startup shell and registry/browser-route tests ([#8186](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8186)).
*   Restored the app dev-smoke chat mount on Bun/Vite canary ([#8184](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8184)).
*   Synced `bun.lock` workspace entries to maintain environment consistency ([#8183](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8183)).
*   Improved local inference by signaling typed unavailability from text handlers when native bindings are missing ([#8191](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8191)).

**Ecosystem Expansion**
*   Added `@1claw/plugin-elizaos` to the curated third-party plugin registry, enabling HSM-backed secret access and multi-chain signing ([#8199](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8199)).

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   [#8198](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8198): feat(app-core): cloud SSO /pair handler for dashboard popup flow.
*   [#8193](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8193): feat(plugin-task-coordinator): sync odysseus UI to latest upstream.

## CLOSED ISSUES
*   None.

## NEW ISSUES
*   None.

## ACTIVE ISSUES
*   None.
